# Local Agent Brain Notes

local-agent-brain is a local-first knowledge kernel for technical users.

The system stores durable evidence in sources, durable reviewed knowledge in memory, and rebuildable runtime data in .brain.

V1 supports ingest, compile, promote, query, health-check, and decision creation without requiring any cloud service.

The project uses a SQLite-backed local index so the query command can answer with provenance from local files.
